title: Beacon Cell Loader
prompt:
Create a production-ready Beacon Cell Loader using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Design a restrained loading state made from four white square cells in a 2-by-2 Bento grid. A single blue beacon travels through the cells to show which preparation stage is active, while visible text names the stage instead of leaving users to infer progress from motion. Use #F4F5F6 around the widget, white cells with #ECECEE borders, 20px to 22px radii, soft neutral shadows, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F helper copy. Blue is the only bright accent. Never use a gradient on a card or a continuous spinner that gives no information.

Expose the component as a status region with aria-live polite and an accessible text label. The demonstration may advance when the user presses a labelled Next stage button; it must not use timers, intervals, random values, storage, remote content, or network requests. Each button has a 44px target with a 3px dark focus ring. Hover lifts the button 2px over 180ms and press compresses it 1px over 90ms. Move the beacon between cells using a spring with stiffness 300 and damping 24; fade the stage caption over 160ms.

Keep the four cells legible in a 320px compact preview and center the same composition in a wider detail view. Use transform and opacity only, meet AA contrast, and do not make color the sole progress indicator. With prefers-reduced-motion, update immediately or use a 120ms opacity fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code plus a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
Indexing stage
*/ .uiwiki-beacon{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;max-width:340px;padding:20px;border-radius:22px;background:#f4f5f6}.uiwiki-beacon span{min-height:64px;padding:12px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:18px;background:#fff;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-beacon i{width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;background:#2563eb;transition:transform 260ms ease}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-beacon i{transition:none}}
